events.title: What's in the US-Iran agreement?
events.summary: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.

events.title: US-Iran deal leaves core sticking points unresolved - and a $300bn question

events.title: US and Iranian presidents sign deal aiming to end war
events.summary: The fate of Iran's nuclear programme, a key reason cited by the US for starting the conflict, is still to be negotiated.

events.title: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
events.summary: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".

events.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
events.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

events.title: Recovery of Ebola patients offers rare moments of joy at epicentre of outbreak
events.summary: There are glimpses of happiness in the Democratic Republic of Congo's fight against the virus that has killed more than 170.

events.title: 'They came with machetes' - deadline looms for migrants to leave South Africa
events.summary: Protesters have set 30 June as the date for all undocumented migrants to leave the country.

events.title: Sexual violence increasingly used as 'weapon of war' in Sudan, UN says

events.title: Kenya to charge students with murder over deadly school fire

events.title: Moscow residents complain of black rain after largest Ukrainian attack hits oil refinery

events.title: Parents of Serbia's teenage school shooter given jail terms in retrial

events.title: Moscow oil refinery attack brings Russia's war with Ukraine closer to home
events.summary: There are moments when life in Moscow feels completely normal - Thursday morning wasn't one of them, writes Steve Rosenberg.

events.title: Fuel sales halted in occupied Crimea as Ukraine targets oil facilities
events.summary: Fuel had already been rationed due to shortages caused by Kyiv's attacks against supply routes in Russian-occupied territories.

events.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes kill 47 as Israel says four soldiers killed by Hezbollah

events.title: US-Iran talks postponed as Israel launches deadly strikes in Lebanon

events.title: Lebanese turtle conservationist Mona Khalil killed by Israeli strike
events.summary: Mona Khalil, who had refused to leave the beach she had spent years protecting, died after several days in hospital, an environmental group said.

events.title: Protest led by India's 'cockroach party' enters its third day

events.title: Dettol apologises after ad to clean up 'toxic men' backfires in China

events.title: Dozens of Awami League activists arrested in Bangladesh as party marks founding anniversary defying ban

events.title: Watch: HL: Lucknow building fire: FIR cites illegal commercial use | Above the Fold | 23.06.2026

events.title: Wayne Bennett rubbishes 'myths' around South Sydney's injuries
